title: Korean Ginger Crumble Bites
description: A sweet and spicy dessert inspired by Korean flavors, made with chewy and crumbly textures.
instructions: Crush rice cakes in a food processor or blender until coarsely chopped.
In a large bowl, mix together crushed rice cakes, ginger syrup, palm sugar, and crystallized ginger.
In a separate bowl, mix together almond flour and coconut oil until crumbly.
Transfer rice cake mixture to a baking dish and top with crumble mixture.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Cut into bite-sized pieces and serve warm.
Drizzle with additional ginger syrup if desired.
